news.title: OpenAI partners with Broadcom to launch Jalapeño intelligence chip
news.description:
OpenAI, in collaboration with Broadcom, has introduced Jalapeño, a purpose-built processor designed for large language model (LLM) inference.
The chip is the first in a planned series of accelerators that the companies are developing jointly. It is intended t…

news.title: OpenAI updates GPT-5.5 Instant to improve conversational context and intent recognition
news.description: OpenAI has released an update for GPT-5.5 Instant, the primary model powering the free tier of ChatGPT. The update focuses on enhancing conversation quality by better identifying the underlying goals behind user questions. This improvement is particularly not…

news.title: Qualcomm to acquire Modular and launch AI chips for data center expansion
news.description: Qualcomm has entered a definitive agreement to acquire Modular Inc., a software infrastructure firm specializing in AI-native software stacks. This acquisition aims to provide a silicon-agnostic compute layer that optimizes AI performance across various hardw…

news.title: Can LLM Agents Select and Engage with Biological Tools?
news.description: Large language model agents are capable of performing initial interactions with biological tools (BTs), indicating that agents could lower expertise barriers for actors seeking to use BTs. Targeted testing of agent design capabilities is warranted.

news.title: Getty Sued An AI Firm In 2023. Now Its Pictures Are Going Into ChatGPT
news.description: Getty’s OpenAI deal shows how AI copyright battles are moving from lawsuits to licensing, as rights-cleared content becomes valuable inside ChatGPT.
